---
title: "Modular workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Modular workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This vignette introduces the Phase 1 modular APIs:

- `compute_vss()`
- `compute_cis()`
- `classify_archetypes()`
- `plot_archetype_landscape()`

```{r}
library(mirBottleneck)

paths <- mirBottleneck:::.toy_paths()
mirna_log <- readRDS(paths$mirna_log)
rna_sym <- readRDS(paths$rna_sym)
mirna_targets <- readRDS(paths$mirna_targets)
mirna_norm_map <- readRDS(paths$mirna_norm_map)

vss <- compute_vss(
  mirna_log = mirna_log,
  rna_sym = rna_sym,
  mirna_targets = mirna_targets,
  mirna_norm_map = mirna_norm_map
)

cis <- compute_cis(
  mirna_log = mirna_log,
  rna_sym = rna_sym,
  mirna_targets = mirna_targets,
  mirna_norm_map = mirna_norm_map,
  scored_mirnas = vss$mirna,
  n_perm = 10
)

classes <- classify_archetypes(vss, cis)
plot_archetype_landscape(classes)
```

## TODO (Phase 2)

Continuous outcome support and modeling extensions.

## TODO (Phase 3)

Pan-cancer parallel scale-up and performance tuning.
